description: Implementation overflows the device or misses timing because RTL coding style made synthesis infer the wrong primitives.
body: Failure mode: a coding pattern leads synthesis to map a memory into distributed LUTs instead of block RAM, or to build wide combinational logic, exploding utilization and routing. Detection signals: utilization far above estimate, the synthesis report showing unexpected primitive counts, and congestion in place-and-route. Do not push through place-and-route while utilization is anomalous. Safer fallback: adjust the RTL style or synthesis attributes to steer the intended mapping, re-synthesize, and confirm utilization returns to budget.
